coherence_narrative: The dominant theme is steady-state operation. The business survived the full 2016-2025 window including the 2021-22 energy crisis, with hedging added £0 vs going naked, minimal crisis-year bill shocks, and 2/2 retention offers accepted. net margin -£8,317 (0.0% of revenue -- below 2-5% benchmark), with I&C customers contributing 0% of net margin. The hedging mandate limited worst-case downside at the cost of expected P&L in calmer years; the I&C book was the primary profit engine throughout. The book is well-diversified between residential and I&C segments.
recommended_actions: I&C margin share 0%: diversified book -- maintain residential acquisition to keep I&C below 70% dependency
Hedging added £0 -- maintain current mandate; the 2022 crisis justifies the cost even in calm years
Net margin 0.0%: below 2% industry floor -- review non-commodity charge pass-through and cost-to-serve allocation
